steps.title: Use the past action
steps.content: "When she made an interesting discovery" places the discovery at a specific moment in the past. The blank describes an action already in progress at that past moment, so the verb needs past progressive tense.

steps.title: Match the tense
steps.content: A uses present tense, B uses present perfect progressive, and C uses future tense. None fits an ongoing action in the past that was happening when the discovery occurred. The past progressive form matches the time relationship. The answer is D.
